name: Attack
definition: When you take the Attack action, you can make one attack roll with a weapon or an Unarmed Strike.
full_text: When you take the Attack action, you can make one attack roll with a weapon or an Unarmed Strike.

equipping_weapons.description: You can either equip or unequip one weapon when you make an attack as part of this action.
equipping_weapons.timing: You do so either before or after the attack
equipping_weapons.equipping: Drawing from sheath or picking it up
equipping_weapons.note: If you equip a weapon before an attack, you don't need to use it for that attack

moving_between_attacks.description: If you move on your turn and have a feature that gives you more than one attack as part of the Attack action, you can use some or all of that movement to move between those attacks
